arts.ttl: WATCH: Real Madrid rue early misses as Manchester City strike first blow
arts.sum: Real Madrid are not had a good start to their Champions League play-off round tie against Manchester City, having fallen behind in the first leg at the Etihad Stadium. It was a fast start from the defending champions, and they had two big chances to break the deadlock. arts.ttl: Chelsea in Real Madrid battle for €84m Premier League ace
arts.sum: Chelsea and Real Madrid have been informed that Murillo is 'likely to leave' Nottingham Forest in the summer, according to a report. Chelsea and Real Madrid are the European behemoths currently associated with the defender and TEAMtalk claims that'some sources' familiar with the player's situation believe that he is 'likely to leave' Forest in the summer.

arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr's private response to Man City fans' brutal banner at Champions League clash
arts.sum: Vinicius Junior missed out on the 2024 Ballon d'Or to Manchester City star Rodri, who's currently out injured but will see his team-mates face Real Madrid in the Champions League
